en: Then the LORD said to Noah, "Go into the ark, you and all your household, for I have seen that you are righteous before me in this generation.
zh: 耶和華對挪亞說：“你和你全家都要進入方舟，因為在這世代中，我見只有你在我面前是個義人。

en: Take with you seven pairs of all clean animals, the male and his mate, and a pair of the animals that are not clean, the male and his mate,
zh: 潔淨的牲畜，你要各帶七公七母；不潔淨的牲畜，你要各帶一公一母；

en: and seven pairs of the birds of the heavens also, male and female, to keep their offspring alive on the face of all the earth.
zh: 空中的飛鳥，也要各帶七公七母，以便傳種，活在全地上；

en: For in seven days I will send rain on the earth forty days and forty nights, and every living thing that I have made I will blot out from the face of the ground."
zh: 因為再過七天，我就要一連四十晝夜降雨在地上，我把所造的一切生物都從地上除滅。”

en: And Noah did all that the LORD had commanded him.
zh: 挪亞就照著耶和華吩咐他的一切作了。

en: Noah was six hundred years old when the flood of waters came upon the earth.
zh: 洪水臨到地上的時候，挪亞剛好是六百歲。

en: And Noah and his sons and his wife and his sons' wives with him went into the ark to escape the waters of the flood.
zh: 挪亞帶著他的兒子、妻子和兒媳一同進了方舟，躲避洪水。

en: Of clean animals, and of animals that are not clean, and of birds, and of everything that creeps on the ground,
zh: 潔淨的牲畜和不潔淨的牲畜，飛鳥和各種在地上爬行的動物，

en: two and two, male and female, went into the ark with Noah, as God had commanded Noah.
zh: 都是一公一母、一對一對來到挪亞那裡，進入方舟，是照著 神吩咐挪亞的。

en: And after seven days the waters of the flood came upon the earth.
zh: 那七天一過，洪水就臨到地上了。

en: In the six hundredth year of Noah's life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on that day all the fountains of the great deep burst forth, and the windows of the heavens were opened.
zh: 挪亞六百歲那一年，二月十七日那一天，所有大淵的泉源都裂開了，天上的窗戶都敞開了。

en: And rain fell upon the earth forty days and forty nights.
zh: 大雨傾盆下在地上，一連四十晝夜。

en: On the very same day Noah and his sons, Shem and Ham and Japheth, and Noah's wife and the three wives of his sons with them entered the ark,
zh: 就在那一天，挪亞帶著他的兒子閃、含、雅弗，以及他的妻子和三個兒媳，一同進了方舟。

en: they and every beast, according to its kind, and all the livestock according to their kinds, and every creeping thing that creeps on the earth, according to its kind, and every bird, according to its kind, every winged creature.
zh: 他們一家，所有走獸各從其類，所有牲畜各從其類，所有在地上爬行的動物各從其類，所有有羽有翼的飛禽各從其類，

en: They went into the ark with Noah, two and two of all flesh in which there was the breath of life.
zh: 有生命、有氣息的，都是一對一對來到挪亞那裡，進入方舟。

en: And those that entered, male and female of all flesh, went in as God had commanded him. And the LORD shut him in.
zh: 那些進去的，都是有生命的，一公一母進去，是照著 神吩咐挪亞的。耶和華跟著就把方舟關起來。

en: The flood continued forty days on the earth. The waters increased and bore up the ark, and it rose high above the earth.
zh: 洪水就臨到地上四十天；水不斷上漲，把方舟升起，於是方舟就從地上浮起來。

en: The waters prevailed and increased greatly on the earth, and the ark floated on the face of the waters.
zh: 水勢甚大，在地上大大上漲，方舟就在水面上漂來漂去。

en: And the waters prevailed so mightily on the earth that all the high mountains under the whole heaven were covered.
zh: 水勢在地面上越來越大，天下所有的高山都被淹沒了。

en: The waters prevailed above the mountains, covering them fifteen cubits deep.
zh: 水勢浩大，比眾山高出七公尺，山嶺都被淹沒了。

en: And all flesh died that moved on the earth, birds, livestock, beasts, all swarming creatures that swarm on the earth, and all mankind.
zh: 凡有生命仍在地上行動的，無論是飛鳥或是牲畜，走獸或是在地上滋生的各樣小生物，以及所有的人都死了；

en: Everything on the dry land in whose nostrils was the breath of life died.
zh: 仍在陸地上，鼻孔裡有氣息的生靈都死了。

en: He blotted out every living thing that was on the face of the ground, man and animals and creeping things and birds of the heavens. They were blotted out from the earth. Only Noah was left, and those who were with him in the ark.
zh: 耶和華把地上的所有生物，從人類到牲畜，爬行的動物，以及空中的飛鳥都除滅了；於是，這一切都從地上消滅了。只留下挪亞和那些與挪亞一同在方舟裡的。

en: And the waters prevailed on the earth 150 days.
zh: 水勢浩大，在地上共一百五十天。
